sourceAmbiguity: Phone-originated continuation could drift into a separate phone-only form.
decisionTaken: Add detail, upload, review, submit, receipt, and status copy all reference canonical Phase 1 semantics.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: The prompt requires reuse of Phase 1 question/upload semantics.
operationalRisk: Later schema changes must update both web and SMS continuation copy.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Bind the detail and evidence views to shared Phase 1 primitives when available.
